feat.name: Divine Weapon
feat.text: You siphon residual spell energy into a weapon you’re wielding. Until the end of your turn, the weapon deals an additional 1d4 spirit damage. If you are holy or unholy, Strikes with the weapon also gain that trait, and the additional damage increases to 2d4 against creatures of the opposing trait.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.

feat.trigger: You finish Casting a Spell using one of your divine spell slots on your turn
